title: Raghav Chadha joins BJP Live Updates: AAP to seek 3 rebel MPs' disqualification from Rajya Sabha
description: Raghav Chadha joins BJP Live Updates: Rajya Sabha MPs Raghav Chadha, Ashok Mittal, Sandeep Pathak, Harbhajan Singh, Rajinder Gupta, Vikram Sahney and Swati Maliwal will merge with the BJP. Stay tuned to this LIVE blog for all the latest updates on the developments.
